headline: Citigroup (C) Heads Into Q2 Earnings With Fair Value In Focus
summary: Citigroup stock moves into Q2 earnings with sentiment in focus Citigroup (C) heads into its July 14 Q2 earnings release with investors already tuned in to higher analyst expectations for earnings and revenue compared with the same quarter last year. The stock has gained 6.3% over the past month and 14.0% over the past 3 months, while its 1 year total return stands at 68.2%. Those figures, alongside upward estimate revisions and sector optimism around loan growth, net interest margins and...
